Leamington Parade.plan:
1 - Culture:

The remote view completed on 11/04/2026 with a score of 95%, at peak time, has been used towards the culture aspect of this audit. Areas of improvement are;

* Peak time consistent delivery of hellos and goodbyes.

* Safe stacking of trays when clearing tables.

2 - Shift Management:

1. Cash reconciliation - outside of parameters today.

3 - Cleanliness:

1. Tables - I have identified a table with chewing gum underneath. Please can we remove this and then add this job to the weekly cleaning schedule.

2. Blender - can we ensure that we are wiping down after every use. It is easier to clean wet liquid than dried residue. 

3. Fridge & Freezer bases - please ensure that these are being wiped down every day.

4 - Maintenance: 

1. Fire stick - monitoring.

2. New sign paint work - monitoring. RW - POA

3. Magrini - fixed - action closed. 

Last planned maintenance visit: 02/03/2026

The remote view conducted at peak on 15/05/2026 has been used to measure the culture aspect of this brand audit. Maintenance area of feedback was;

* Productivity lower than normal with some "leaning" observed.
* Remember to let me know (the viewer) about potential break times and who will be covering that station during the break.

2 - Cleanliness:

1. Syrup pumps/stands - sticky stands present and some of the actual pumps require soaking. Let's get this on the daily cleaning schedule.

2. Not marked down as it is difficult for you to manage but I am concerned that we will end up with ants outside if we down get the area jet washed. Once this is done, it should make it easier to manage with deck scrubbing added to you cleaning schedule.

3 - Product:

1. Only gave the croissant "good" today as it had black specks on it from the cooking Matt. Let's ensure that we are wiping these Matt's down to avoid old burnt food transferring to the next product.

No issues.
